item.title: Evolve rollback — clawhq evolve rollback/history
steps: Define EvolveChange record: id, timestamp, change_type (skill_install/integration_add/provider_add/tool_install/identity_update), target, previous_state, new_state, rollback_snapshot_id, rollback_expires_at
Implement rollback snapshot creation on every Evolve action — call before applying change
Implement `clawhq evolve rollback <change-id>`: reverse specific change by restoring files, reverting config, triggering image rebuild if needed
Implement `clawhq evolve history`: show all Evolve changes with IDs, timestamps, change type, and rollback status (available/expired)
Write unit tests for rollback mechanics across all change types
acceptanceCriteria: Every Evolve action (skill, integration, provider, tool, identity) automatically creates a rollback snapshot before applying
`clawhq evolve rollback <id>` fully reverses the named change
Rollback triggers Stage 2 rebuild when the reversed change affected container image
Rollback snapshots expire after 30 days; expired rollbacks show 'unavailable' in history
`clawhq evolve history` shows complete change history with rollback availability
